title: Spicy Silky Light Tunisian Tomato Stir-fry
description: A light and flavorful dish combining spicy tomatoes with a touch of sherry for added depth, all while maintaining a low-fat-friendly profile.

ingredients.name: 1 cup ripe plum or cherry tomatoes
1/4 cup diced canned light tuna in water (optional)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place tomatoes in a microwave-safe dish. Microwave for about 30 seconds or until slightly softened.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook, stirring occasionally, until the onions are translucent (about 5 minutes).
Add tomatoes from microwave to the skillet along with sherry vinegar, cayenne pepper, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper. Stir well.
If using tuna, add it to the skillet at this point. If not using tuna, continue stirring until all ingredients are heated through (about 2-3 minutes).
Remove from heat and stir in dill. Serve hot as a side dish or over rice for an easy meal.
